name: cc-conversation-search
description: Codex adapter for Mercurai's cc-conversation-search fork with Claude session mining and transcript fallbacks.

interface.shortDescription: Find, inspect, and mine Claude Code sessions from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Uses Mercurai's cc-conversation-search fork for search and session resolution, then falls back to direct transcript mining and local autoresearch correlation.
defaultPrompt: Mine this Claude Code session ID for workflow failures, tool calls, lessons, and config changes.
Find the Claude Code session where we discussed autoresearch and summarize the decisions.
Search recent Claude Code conversations for prior work on this bug before implementing a fix.
